header.title: Applications & shared housing setup
header.subtitle: A Sarintany'COLOC-inspired flow to track applications, organize teams, and validate the shared housing.

realPanel.title: Received applications
realPanel.notApplied: You have not applied to this listing yet.
realPanel.notAppliedHint: Apply by clicking the "Apply to this flatshare" button above.
realPanel.alreadyApplied: You have already applied to this listing.
realPanel.alreadyAppliedHint: Click "View my application" to see all applications.
realPanel.empty: No applications yet. Be the first to apply!

modals.applyIntro: Send a personalized message to improve your chances.
modals.applyPlaceholder: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you are interested...
modals.celebrationText: You helped several roommates meet through your home for better living together.

contract.title: Your flatshare contract
contract.intro: Your contract includes everything needed to create a legal agreement between roommates and the owner.
contract.splitFee: The fee will be split between roommates — each one pays their share. You, as owner, pay nothing.
contract.operatorFees: Operator fees are paid by the buyer.
contract.paidPart: Your share {{reference}} of {{amount}} Ar has been saved.
contract.allPaid: All shares are paid: the contract is validated.
contract.paymentCheck: The payment will be checked by our team.
contract.finalSave: By clicking Finish, the contract will be saved. Each roommate will then pay their share; you pay nothing.

notifications.title: Notification
notifications.noneWon: The accepted-roommate notification will be available when the flatshare is officially launched.
notifications.noneLost: The not-selected notification will be available when the flatshare is officially launched.
notifications.groupChatOpen: Your group conversation remains open so you can organize.
notifications.mapHint: Go back to the map to find housing that suits you even better.
notifications.alertHint: Enable an alert to be notified about new flatshares matching your criteria.
